(43C) Second Interruption Date DATE 8 The second date when the patient leaves the inpatient rehabilitation facility in a program interruption situation (Item 42 - a situation where a Medicare inpatient is discharged from the inpatient rehabilitation facility and returns to the same inpatient rehabilitation facility within 3 consecutive calendar days).
158 _43D RTRN_2_DT (43D) Second Return Date DATE 8 The date when the patient returns to the inpatient rehabilitation facility in a program
